parameters.command: =python3 /scripts/pinterest_video_upload.py --file "{{ $('Stage Video to Downloads').first().json.filePath }}" --title "{{ $('Parse Grok Response').first().json.title }}" --description "{{ $('Parse Grok Response').first().json.description }}" --board "{{ $('Parse Grok Response').first().json.board_name }}"

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { skipped: true, reason: $input.first().json.reason || 'No videos available' } }];
